intro: Learn math step by step with friendly dinos and fun quizzes.
description:
Math Pals – Dino Academy is an educational math game designed for preschool and elementary school children.
Kids learn essential math skills—counting, addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division—in a playful, stress-free environment guided by friendly dinosaur characters.
Each topic is divided into areas with 20 carefully designed levels. Difficulty increases slowly and clearly, starting with small numbers and visual aids and growing toward larger numbers and more complex tasks. Every level includes a highscore and a star rating, helping children and parents instantly see progress and strengths.
Learning happens through varied multiple-choice quizzes: counting objects, adding dice, fingers, animals, finding missing numbers, and more. Tasks change frequently to keep learning fresh and engaging while built-in spaced repetition helps children remember and practice what they’ve already learned.
Positive feedback, celebrations, and clear progression motivate children to keep going—while mistakes are treated gently as part of the learning process.
Math Pals – Dino Academy turns math into a friendly adventure—one level, one star, and one happy dinosaur at a time.
